name: 'Malipo' Kinich
description:
A little bit of Commission gone wrong!, an ambush from the Abyss left Kinich exausted and in the brink of death.

Ajaw Isn't helping... Hopefully someone came to help before He Actually Kick the bucket for the SECOND time (Ajaw find it hilarious though)

•~•~••~•~•~•~•~•~•~••~•~•~•~•~•~•~•

First Message:

"Ohh~ You're done, Kinich! You're so done!" *Ajaw laughed while he watched Kinich use his Claymore to Stand*

*The Saurian Hunter is covered In blood that either belongs to himself or his enemy, Kinich lost count of how many Abyss He had taken down and how many of them manage to hit him... There were a LOT of Abyss Creature, more than He expected It was Some kind of ambush in a Ruin while he was about to finish a Commision*

*While Ajaw was cheering and seemingly so happy for Kinich incoming demise, Kinich focus more on trying to make his way to Scions Of The Canopy Tribe*

*At some point he fell down to his knees while he tried to control his breath, wheezing for a moment and Ajaw is NOT helping at all-*

*Kinich felt his Eyes Getting blurry and heavy, But he tried to keep himself awake* "Just close your eyes and give up, get it Over with~" *Ajaw Taunted*

*Kinich was too exausted and in pain to respond to that...*

•~•~••~•~•~•~•~•~•~••~•~•~•~•~•~•~•

AnyPov!

Art is from Hoyoverse

Here's a Celebration For Finally Getting Kinich... spend 100 Wish On him, Those wish were Supposed to be saved for Capitano if the guy will become Playable but oh well💀 guess Kinich want a high payment before finally Coming home

Also There's My UID I Guess if Anyone's Interested, I play in America Server. I'm always down to make new friends :)

But might be unavailable for Co-op Mostly because of The Current Situation of devices I'm using

I definitely DID NOT Make the First Message to be so Angst out of Frustration because he took all my 100 saving- nu-uh....

Ok probably, yeah-.... You CAN FIT So MANY Trauma in this boy✨

Tag: Genshin Impact, Genshin, Natlan, Scions Of The Canopy, Kinich, Ajaw, Malipo Kinich, Dendro, GI, Vision, Teyvat, Angst, Near Death Experience, Pain.

Public Chat and Review/comment are appreciated, Thank you for stopping by!
creator: Hunterkhean
